rulings.Case Title: INFAC MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, VS. COMDISCO INVESTMENT GROUP, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, November 8, 2011, line 6, DEFENDANTS VERNON LOUCKS AND CHARLES LOUCKS' Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. Plaintiff alleges that defendants wrongfully took his shares and that allegation shows that a derivative suit is unnecessary. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges conversion, the terms of the contract, the breach of contract, and the breach of fiduciary duties. A factual issue remains regarding defendants' management duties with regard to IIG. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties by 4pm stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
